subcodes.first_line: He is the All-Powerful over whatsoever He willeth through His Word "Be" and it is! Verily, this evanescent servant proclaimeth before the face of the world that concerning the matter of conflict between two governments, the Will of God hath thus been ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو المقتدر علی ما یشاء بقوله کن فیکون ان الخادم الفانی یصیح امام وجه العالم الی در فقرهٴ نزاع دولتین ارادة الله چنین تعلق گرفته
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
